title: gladiolus iroensis
intro: Gladiolus iroensis, commonly known as the Japanese gladiolus or Iro Gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant native to Japan, belonging to the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus iroensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are typically made from the roots and used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat various ailments.
